hero_title_line2: That Keeps Data Where It Belongs

hero_below_fold_tagline: All European. All integrated. All privacy-first.
hero_below_fold_description: When proprietary software gets banned and raises compliance concerns, schools need a real alternative, not another compromise. EduTab gives you everything in one place: pre-configured tablets that work out of the box, a curated EduTab App Marketplace with only educational apps, and a device management system that puts teachers in control of their classrooms.
hero_below_fold_footer: Built in Europe. Data stays in Europe. Trusted by schools across the continent.
problem_solution_title: Why Schools Across Europe Are Switching to EduTab
problem_text_1: The role of digital tools in education system is becoming essential, however, most digital solutions are raising privacy concerns and data routing outside EU becoming a real issue. Parents are demanding privacy! With IT teams stretched thin and teachers losing precious classroom time to device chaos, an alternative solution is needed.
problem_text_2: The patchwork approach doesn't work anymore. Buying tablets from one vendor, MDM from another, and hoping it all works together—that's not a solution. That's a headache waiting to happen.
solution_text: EduTab is the only European provider offering a complete, integrated education technology ecosystem.
three_pillars_subtitle: EduTab is the only European provider offering everything you need in one integrated solution.
three_pillars_tablets_description: Pre-configured, open source Android tablets that arrive ready to learn. Connect to WiFi, and they're set up in under 5 minutes—not the 30-60 minutes you're used to.
three_pillars_marketplace_description: A curated marketplace of 50-100 educational apps. Every app is security-scanned. No ads, no tracking, period! Schools control exactly which apps their students can access.
three_pillars_portal_description: Powerful device management that's actually designed for education. Give IT administrators fleet control while letting teachers manage their own classrooms—without involvement from IT.
audience_title: Built for Everyone in Your School
audience_subtitle: EduTab serves every role in your educational institution with tools designed specifically for your needs.
audience_it_description: Stop spending weekends on device updates. EduTab Portal gives you one dashboard for thousands of devices with real-time status, remote troubleshooting, bulk operations, and zero-touch enrolment. Scan a QR code, and new devices configure themselves.
audience_it_feature_1: Real-time fleet monitoring across all locations
audience_it_feature_2: Remote control without leaving your desk
audience_it_feature_4: Role-based access for teachers and staff
audience_teachers_description: Your classroom. Your rules. No waiting for IT. Launch an app on every student tablet with one click. Lock screens when you need attention. Set up exam mode for tests. EduTab puts you in control of learning environment, not at mercy of technology.
audience_teachers_feature_1: One-click app launching across all student devices
audience_teachers_feature_2: Instant screen lock for classroom attention
audience_teachers_feature_3: Kiosk mode for focused learning and exams
audience_teachers_feature_4: Simple interface designed for educators, not IT professionals
audience_school_boards_description: Sleep easier knowing your school's technology won't make headlines for the wrong reasons. EduTab is GDPR-compliant by design, not as an afterthought. Data is hosted in EU data centers. There are no hidden transfers to US servers, no surprise compliance issues, no letters from data protection authorities.
audience_school_boards_feature_2: EU data hosting with transparent data handling

getting_started_step1_desc: Just an email address. That's all we need. You'll get immediate access to EduTab App Store and can explore Portal.
getting_started_step2_desc: Add up to 30 devices for 30 days—no credit card, no commitment. Use your existing tablets or order ours.
getting_started_step3_desc: Watch setup times drop. See teachers taking control of their classrooms. Notice how compliance stops being a worry.
getting_started_trial_info: 30 days. 30 devices. No credit card required.
differentiators_subtitle: Three things that set EduTab apart from everything else
differentiators_european_desc: EduTab isn't an American product rebranded for Europe. It's built by European educators, hosted on European servers, designed for European privacy standards. We didn't add GDPR compliance as a checkbox, we started with it.
differentiators_european_link: Learn About Our Open Source Commitment
differentiators_opensource_desc: We believe transparency builds trust. EduTab Portal is built on Headwind MDM, a proven open-source foundation. Our EduTab App Marketplace runs on F-Droid technology, most trusted open-source Android app distribution platform. You can inspect what runs on your devices.
differentiators_opensource_link: Learn About Our Open Source Commitment
differentiators_teacher_desc: EduTab was created by Meester Chip, a digital creativity teacher who worked with students from age 3 to adulthood across all types of schools. After years of watching the same problems repeat—lost class time, frustrated teachers, privacy concerns—he built what schools actually needed.
testimonials_subtitle: Schools in multiple European countries are already using EduTab to simplify their technology while strengthening their privacy posture.
testimonial_1_quote: Finally, a solution that teachers can actually use without calling IT every time something goes wrong.
testimonial_2_quote: We needed to move away from Google Workspace. EduTab made the transition straightforward.

final_cta_subtitle: 30 days. 30 devices. No credit card required. Experience the complete EduTab ecosystem with your team.

page_home_description: European tablets, apps, and device management in one integrated ecosystem. GDPR-compliant by design. No proprietary software, no data concerns, no compromises. Start your free trial today.
page_home_og_description: European tablets, apps, and device management in one integrated ecosystem. GDPR-compliant by design. Start your free trial today.
about_page_title: About EduTab - Built by a Teacher for Schools
about_page_description: EduTab was founded by Meester Chip, a digital creativity teacher who saw the same technology problems in every school. Learn our story and mission.
about_hero_title: Built by a Teacher Who Saw the Problem Firsthand
about_hero_subtitle: It was born in European classrooms.
about_story_subtitle: From classroom frustrations to a complete solution built for European schools
about_timeline_1_desc: Meester Chip spent years as a digital creativity teacher, working with students of all ages—from 3-year-olds discovering tablets for the first time to adults returning to education. Primary schools, secondary schools, vocational training, special education—every type of school, every type of learner. And everywhere, the same problems: devices that took half the lesson to set up, teachers who couldn't control what students were doing on screens, IT administrators drowning in tickets, privacy concerns keeping school boards awake at night.
about_timeline_2_title: There Had to Be Something Better
about_timeline_2_desc: The solutions on the market were either American products that treated European privacy laws as an afterthought, enterprise tools designed for corporations not classrooms, or free options that made students and teachers the product. There had to be something better.
about_timeline_3_desc: EduTab started with a simple question: What if we built education technology that understood how European schools actually work? Not how corporate IT departments work, not how American schools work. That meant privacy from the ground up, teacher control that doesn't require an IT degree, simplicity that doesn't sacrifice capability, and European hosting that keeps data where it legally belongs.
about_timeline_4_desc: EduTab is the only European provider offering tablets, apps, and management in one integrated solution. No juggling multiple vendors, no finger-pointing when something goes wrong, no integration headaches. Just technology that works for schools.
about_timeline_5_desc: We don't have a "GDPR compliance mode" because GDPR compliance is our only mode. We believe privacy is a right, not a premium feature. European data stays in Europe, always.
about_timeline_6_desc: Every feature is evaluated against a simple test: will this help teachers or burden them? The teacher-facing tools in EduTab exist because teachers shouldn't need IT expertise to manage their classrooms.
about_mission_statement: To give European schools technology that respects their values.
about_mission_desc: Education technology should serve learning, not advertising models, not data harvesting, not corporate lock-in strategies. When a school adopts technology, that technology should work for the school, not the other way around.
about_value_1_desc: Not a premium feature, but the foundation of everything we build. We never sell student data, we never track beyond what's necessary, and we keep all data on EU servers.
about_value_2_desc: We give teachers the tools to manage devices, apps, and settings without needing to file IT tickets. Control that empowers, not restricts.
about_value_3_desc: Built in the Netherlands, hosted in the EU, governed by European law. No data transfers to non-EU jurisdictions, no legal uncertainty.
about_value_4_desc: The EduTab Portal is built on Headwind MDM, a proven open-source platform. We're not asking you to trust black boxes—you can inspect what runs on your devices.
about_ecosystem_subtitle: Three components that work together seamlessly
about_ecosystem_tablet_desc: Pre-configured, non-proprietary devices that arrive ready for learning. European supply chain. Purpose-built for education.
about_ecosystem_marketplace_desc: Curated educational applications with no ads, no tracking, and full security scanning. Built on F-Droid's trusted open-source foundation.
about_ecosystem_portal_desc: Device management designed for education—fleet control for IT, classroom control for teachers. Built on Headwind MDM's proven open-source technology.
about_team_subtitle: EduTab is a small, focused team of educators and engineers who believe European schools deserve better technology.
about_team_bio: Building the future of European education technology.
about_team_growing: We're growing. If you share our mission and want to help build the future of European education technology, we'd love to hear from you.
about_location_1: EU data protection laws apply to our operations
about_location_3: EU regulatory standards govern our practices
about_location_4: No data transfers to non-EU jurisdictions

about_final_cta_meaning: "Toekomst" means "future" in Dutch—and that's what we're building.

portal_intro_title: Why Most MDM Doesn't Work for Schools
portal_intro_desc: Most MDM solutions are enterprise software awkwardly adapted for education. EduTab Portal is different—it's built from the ground up for how schools actually work: IT teams managing hundreds of devices, teachers needing quick classroom control, and everyone accountable to strict privacy regulations.

faq_meta_title: EduTab FAQ - Frequently Asked Questions About School Tablet Management
faq_meta_description: Answers to common questions about EduTab school tablet management, GDPR compliance, pricing, features, and getting started. Everything you need to know.
faq_meta_keywords: EduTab FAQ, School MDM questions, GDPR tablet management questions, Education device management FAQ, EduTab help
faq_og_description: Common questions about EduTab tablet management for schools. GDPR, pricing, features, and more.
faq_hero_subtitle: Find answers to common questions about EduTab
faq_hero_contact_prefix: Can't find what you're looking for?
faq_gs_what_is_intro: EduTab is a complete education technology ecosystem for European schools. It includes three integrated components:
faq_gs_what_is_marketplace_desc: A curated marketplace of educational apps
faq_gs_what_is_portal_desc: Device management software for IT and teachers
faq_gs_what_is_outro: Together, they provide everything a school needs for tablet-based learning, with privacy built-in from the start.
faq_gs_how_start_step1: Create a free account with just your email address
faq_gs_how_start_step2: Start a 30-day free trial (30 devices, no credit card required)
faq_gs_how_start_step3: Add your devices via QR code scanning
faq_gs_how_start_step4: Configure your settings and deploy apps
faq_gs_how_start_step5: Decide whether to continue with cloud hosting, self-hosting, or just the free EduTab App Marketplace
faq_gs_need_buy_title: Do I need to buy EduTab tablets?
faq_gs_need_buy_p1: No. EduTab works with most existing Android tablets running Android 8 or later. You can use your current devices with our EduTab Portal and EduTab App Marketplace.
faq_gs_need_buy_p2: If you want pre-configured tablets that arrive ready to use, we offer EduTab branded tablets, but they're optional.
faq_gs_trial_title: What's included in the free trial?
faq_gs_trial_content: Everything. Full access to all EduTab Portal features, the complete EduTab App Marketplace, and support. You can enroll up to 30 devices for 30 days with no credit card required.
faq_gdpr_compliant_intro: Yes. EduTab is designed for GDPR compliance from the ground up:
faq_gdpr_compliant_eu_hosting_desc: All data is stored in European data centers
faq_gdpr_compliant_no_transfers_desc: Data never leaves the EU for processing
faq_gdpr_compliant_transparency_desc: Clear documentation of all data handling
faq_gdpr_where_stored_content: All data is hosted in EU data centers. You can choose from multiple EU locations based on your requirements.
faq_gdpr_sell_data_content: Absolutely not. We don't sell, share, or monetize any data. Our business model is subscription-based—you pay for the software, not with your data.
faq_gdpr_under_16_title: Can we use EduTab for students under 16?
faq_gdpr_under_16_content: Yes. EduTab is designed for all age groups. Since there's no data sharing with third parties and all processing stays within the EU, consent complexities that affect other platforms don't apply.
faq_gdpr_dpa_title: Do you provide a Data Processing Agreement (DPA)?
faq_gdpr_dpa_content: Yes. We provide DPA templates that meet GDPR requirements. Contact us for your copy.
faq_features_it_admin_title: What can IT administrators do with EduTab Portal?
faq_features_it_admin_1: View real-time status of all devices (online/offline, battery, location)
faq_features_it_admin_2: Remote control devices (restart, lock, wipe, troubleshoot)
faq_features_it_admin_3: Deploy apps to individual devices or groups
faq_features_it_admin_5: Set up kiosk mode for single-app use
faq_features_it_admin_8: Support devices remotely without site visits
faq_features_teachers_intro: Teachers get classroom-level control without IT expertise:
faq_features_teachers_1: Launch apps on all student devices with one click
faq_features_teachers_3: View which apps students are using
faq_features_teachers_4: Set up exam/kiosk mode for tests
faq_features_teachers_6: No IT involvement required for routine tasks
faq_features_zero_touch_content: New devices can be enrolled by simply scanning a QR code. The device automatically downloads its configuration, enrolls in your EduTab Portal, and is ready to use—typically in under 5 minutes.
faq_features_offline_content: Devices can function offline with cached apps and content. They sync with the EduTab Portal when connectivity returns. For schools with limited internet, this ensures learning continues.
faq_features_location_content: Yes, optionally. Schools can enable location tracking for theft recovery or administrative purposes. This feature is disabled by default and can be enabled based on your policies.
faq_mp_what_is_title: What is the EduTab App Marketplace?
faq_mp_what_is_intro: A curated collection of 50-100 educational applications, security-scanned and verified. Unlike other systems:
faq_mp_what_is_3: No commercial/proprietary account required, only an EduTab account is necessary
faq_mp_what_is_4: Schools control which apps students can access
faq_mp_free_title: How is the EduTab App Marketplace free?
faq_mp_free_content: The EduTab App Marketplace is built on F-Droid open-source technology. We curate and scan apps, but there's no licensing cost to pass on. It's our way of ensuring all schools can access quality educational apps.
faq_mp_upload_title: Can we upload our own apps?
faq_mp_upload_content: Yes. Schools can upload private apps that are only available to their organization. This is useful for custom educational content or school-specific applications.
faq_mp_request_title: Can we request apps to be added?
faq_mp_request_content: Yes. If there's an educational app you need that isn't in our catalog, let us know. We review requests and add apps that meet our quality and security standards.
faq_mp_safe_title: Are apps in the marketplace safe?
faq_mp_safe_content: Every app undergoes security scanning (including VirusTotal integration) before appearing in the marketplace. We also review apps for appropriate educational use.
faq_pricing_cost_tablets_desc: €199 each with cover, or €7,500 for 25 tablets with charging cabinet
faq_pricing_minimum_title: Is there a minimum number of devices?
faq_pricing_minimum_content: No minimum. You can start with a single device.
faq_pricing_annual_content: Annual billing gives you 2 months free (approximately 17% discount).
faq_pricing_cancel_content: Yes. There are no long-term contracts. Cancel your subscription at any time, and your service continues until the end of your paid period.
faq_pricing_po_content: Yes. For annual subscriptions, we can work with institutional purchase order processes. Contact us for details.
faq_pricing_after_trial_title: What happens after my trial ends?
faq_pricing_after_trial_content: Nothing automatic. You won't be charged. Your account converts to the free tier (EduTab App Marketplace access only). To continue using EduTab Portal features, simply choose a subscription plan.
faq_tech_android_content: EduTab supports Android 8.0 and later. This covers most tablets from 2017 onward.
faq_tech_compatible_intro: Most Android tablets work with EduTab. For the best experience, we recommend tablets with:
faq_tech_compatible_outro: If you're unsure about specific models,
faq_tech_other_title: What about iPhones, iPads, Windows, or Chrome OS devices?
faq_tech_other_content: No, EduTab currently focuses only on Android devices.
faq_tech_integrations_title: Can we integrate with our existing systems?
faq_tech_integrations_outro: API documentation is available to customers.
faq_tech_selfhost_3: Reasonable hardware specs based on fleet size
faq_tech_selfhost_4: Technical expertise for installation and maintenance
faq_migration_google_title: We're currently using Google Workspace. Can we switch?
faq_migration_google_intro: Yes. Many schools are transitioning away from Google Workspace due to compliance concerns. EduTab provides:
faq_migration_google_1: An alternative app ecosystem (no Google Play dependency)
faq_migration_mdm_title: We're using another MDM. How hard is it to switch?
faq_migration_mdm_intro: Switching MDM solutions involves a few easy steps:
faq_migration_mdm_1: Unenrolling devices from your current solution
faq_migration_mdm_2: Factory resetting devices (recommended for clean start)
faq_migration_mdm_3: Enrolling in EduTab via QR code
faq_migration_mdm_outro: For large-scale migrations, this can be done in batches during breaks or after school hours.
faq_migration_alongside_title: Can we run EduTab alongside our existing MDM?
faq_migration_alongside_content: Not recommended. Running multiple MDM solutions on the same device creates conflicts. We recommend migrating fully rather than running in parallel.
faq_support_teacher_content: The teacher interface is designed to be intuitive. Most teachers become comfortable within their first class session. We provide documentation for specific features, and support is available for questions.
faq_support_onsite_intro: For larger deployments, we can discuss on-site training or setup assistance.
faq_security_how_1: Encryption in transit and at rest
faq_security_wipe_content: Yes. If a device is lost or stolen, administrators can remotely wipe it through the Portal.
faq_security_certs_intro: We are actively working toward formal certifications. Currently, we provide:
faq_cta_contact_desc: Get in touch with our team
faq_footer_note: EduTab is a product of Toekomst.school, based in the Netherlands.
os_meta_title: Open Source Education Technology - EduTab's Commitment to Transparency
os_meta_description: EduTab is built on open-source foundations: Headwind MDM for device management and F-Droid for app distribution. Learn why transparency matters for school technology.
os_meta_keywords: open source MDM, open source school software, Headwind MDM education, F-Droid schools, transparent education technology, open source device management
os_og_title: EduTab Open Source - Transparency in Education Technology
os_og_description: Built on Headwind MDM and F-Droid. See our code. Trust our technology.
os_hero_subtitle: When you put technology in front of students, you should be able to verify what it does. That's why EduTab is built on open-source foundations.
os_why_title: Why Open Source Matters for Schools
os_why_subtitle: Most education technology is a black box. Open-source software is different—the code is visible, inspectable, and auditable by anyone.
os_solution_p1: Open-source software is visible, inspectable, and auditable. Security researchers can find vulnerabilities. Developers can verify privacy claims. Schools can understand exactly what's running on their devices.
os_solution_p2: This isn't theoretical. Open-source security through transparency is why it powers most of the internet's infrastructure—from servers running websites to encryption protecting communications.
os_blackbox_intro: With proprietary software, you install it and hope it works, trusting the vendor's promises. But how do you:
os_blackbox_1: Verify data isn't collected without your knowledge?
os_blackbox_3: Assess security if you can't see the code?
os_blackbox_4: Know what happens if the vendor disappears?
os_blackbox_outro: With proprietary software, you're relying on trust without verification.
os_foundations_subtitle: EduTab is built on proven open-source technologies that have been tested and improved by global communities.
os_security_desc: The code is publicly reviewable. Anyone can verify security claims and find vulnerabilities.
os_lockin_desc: The underlying technology isn't proprietary. You're never locked into a single vendor.
os_improvement_desc: We contribute back to open-source projects. Benefits are shared across the community.
os_contributions_subtitle: Open source is a two-way relationship. We don't just benefit from community work—we contribute back.
os_improvements_1_desc: Teacher controls and classroom management additions
os_repos_desc: We publish EduTab-specific modifications, integration tools, documentation, and deployment guides.
os_repos_footer: Star our repositories. Review code. Report issues. Suggest improvements.
os_trust_proprietary_3: If something goes wrong, you might never know
os_trust_opensource_3: Issues are discovered and fixed publicly
os_trust_question: For education where student privacy is paramount, which model makes more sense?
os_q1_title: Does open source mean less secure?
os_q1_answer: The opposite is usually true. With proprietary software, only the vendor's team reviews the code. With open source, anyone with expertise can find and report issues. This "many eyes" approach catches problems faster. Major security-critical software (Linux, encryption libraries, web servers) is open source precisely because security benefits from transparency.
os_q2_title: If the code is open, can anyone steal it?
os_q2_answer: The code is available, but running a competitive service requires more than code—it requires ongoing development, support, infrastructure, and expertise. Open source prevents lock-in, not competition.
os_q3_answer_p1: Open source refers to license, not price. EduTab offers a
os_q3_answer_p3: (we run it for you with support). The code is free. The service is the value!
os_q4_title: Can we modify the code ourselves?
os_q4_answer: Yes. If you have development resources, you can fork the code and modify it for your specific needs. Many organizations do this for custom requirements.
os_transparency_subtitle: Our commitment to transparency extends beyond code.
os_transparent_pricing_desc: All prices are published. No "contact sales for pricing" games.
os_transparent_data_desc: We document exactly what we collect and why. No mystery, no hidden functionality.
os_transparent_docs_desc: Documentation is public, not hidden behind customer portals.
os_transparent_roadmap_desc: Development priorities are discussed publicly. Issues and feature requests are tracked openly.
os_final_subtitle: Experience the platform yourself with a free trial, explore our source code, or self-host on your own infrastructure.
os_final_try_desc: Experience the platform yourself with a 30-day free trial.
os_final_explore_desc: Review what powers EduTab on GitHub.
os_final_selfhost_desc: Run EduTab on your own infrastructure for free.
os_final_footer: EduTab is a product of Toekomst.school, based in Netherlands. Built on open source, committed to transparency.
